title: Executive Order 7525—Exemption of Robert W. Shumate from Compulsory Retirement for Age

flags.justification: Exercises a specific, narrow, congressionally-provided exemption authority applied to one named individual.
A clear, specific, individual personnel action.
A personnel action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
The order explicitly continues the individual's service only 'until January 1, 1938' — a specific, defined end date.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
About as narrow and individual-specific an action as exists: a personnel exemption for one named employee.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
A single, narrow, time-bound personnel accommodation for one named individual under an express statutory exemption mechanism, not a broad undermining carve-out.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/12 = 0.0%. An individual-specific personnel exemption — exempting one named federal employee from mandatory retirement age for a few months.
